📚 Theo’s Adventures 21 interactive stories — choose your path through history, philosophy, and literature ➔
⚙ Educational Instruments 9 browser-based learning tools — no accounts, no tracking ➔

About This Catalog

All materials are generated by the Curriculum Factory — an automated pipeline that converts LaTeX textbooks into multimedia learning experiences using Claude Code (Anthropic), Google NotebookLM, and the YouTube Data API.

Textbooks are CC BY-SA 4.0 licensed. Quizzes are self-grading. This is a beta release — content may contain errors.

Not professional advice: These materials are for educational purposes only.

Read · Quiz · Study — A complete learning experience

AI-assisted: Claude Code + Google NotebookLM. Uses YouTube Data API v3. Privacy Policy
